title: 2 Pack Brass Small Padlocks with Keys, 32mm Heavy Duty Small Padlock, Weather Proof Padlock for Gym Lockers Suitcases Containers Gate Garage Shed
features: [Superior Rust Resistance] Crafted from premium brass casting, this padlock delivers exceptional rust and corrosion resistance, withstanding harsh weather conditions. Its robust lock body ensures lasting durability for both indoor and outdoor use.

[Enhanced Security] The precision-engineered lock cylinder effectively prevents technical lock picking. Featuring exceptional resistance to cutting and sawing, this small padlock resists external tampering, providing solid, reliable security.

[Compact and Portable] With a compact size (main body approx. 3.2cm × 1.4cm, total height 5cm) and lightweight design, this small padlocks with keys adds minimal bulk. It's the perfect choice for gym lockers, diaries, suitcases, storage cabinets, and more.

[Dual-Set with Spare Keys] Each locker padlocks comes with three identical keys for flexible use—perfect for personal use or sharing with family. Say goodbye to lost keys and enjoy a portable security solution for daily life, travel, and work.

[Classic Vintage Design] The padlock's polished surface radiates a warm, elegant antique bronze finish. This makes it not only a practical security tool but also a stylish accessory, adding a touch of vintage charm to your personal belongings.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Gym lockers, suitcases, storage containers, gates, sheds
